zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley於大約1069年出生在蘇格蘭班福爾時，他的父親Roger I De Berkeley Lord of Gloucestershire30歲，母親Rissa Montgomery26歲。他於1095年之前與Almodis結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1131年9月29日在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley于大约1069年出生在苏格兰班福爾时，他的父亲Roger I De Berkeley Lord of Gloucestershire30岁，母亲Rissa Montgomery26岁。他于1095年之前与Almodis结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1131年9月29日在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley was born about 1069, in Banffshire, Scotland, his father, Roger I De Berkeley Lord of Gloucestershire, was 30 and his mother, Rissa Montgomery, was 26. He married Almodis before 1095. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died on 29 September 1131, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley est né environ 1069, à Banffshire, Écosse, son père, Roger I De Berkeley Lord of Gloucestershire, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Rissa Montgomery, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Almodis avant 1095. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1131, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley um 1069 in Banffshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger I De Berkeley Lord of Gloucestershire 30 und seine Mutter Rissa Montgomery 26. Er hat vor 1095 Almodis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb am 29. September 1131 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley è nato il circa 1069 nel Banffshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Roger I De Berkeley Lord of Gloucestershire, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Rissa Montgomery, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Almodis prima del 1095. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì il 29 settembre 1131, nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartleyが約1069年にスコットランドバンフシュアイアで生まれた時，父Roger I De Berkeley Lord of Gloucestershireは30歳，母Rissa Montgomeryは26歳であった。1095年以前にAlmodisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1131年9月29日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley(이)가 대략 1069년 스컷랜드 반프실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger I De Berkeley Lord of Gloucestershire(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Rissa Montgomery(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1095년 이전 Almodis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1131년 9월 29일 영국 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley nasceu aproximadamente 1069, em Banffshire, Scotland, seu pai, Roger I De Berkeley Lord of Gloucestershire, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Rissa Montgomery, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Almodis antes 1095. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1131, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley родился около 1069 г. в местности банффшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Roger I De Berkeley Lord of Gloucestershire было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Rissa Montgomery, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Almodis перед 1095 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер 29 сентября 1131 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley nació aproximadamente 1069, en Banffshire, Scotland, su papá, Roger I De Berkeley Lord of Gloucestershire, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Rissa Montgomery, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Almodis antes de 1095. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1131, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
